series_metadata.series_title: Seed Labeler, Legume Inoculant Applicator and Legume Inoculant Labeler Registrations
series_metadata.series_description: This series includes: Seed registrations, legume inoculant applicator registrations, and legume inoculant labeler registrations. Records will be retained if registrant is subject of active litigation.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: in office, expiration, cancelation, and/or litigation is complete
